name: Household CRUD + household pages (no active household global)
description: Implement household CRUD and household management pages without any global active-household state. Backend: POST /api/v1/households, GET /api/v1/households, GET /api/v1/households/:id, PATCH /api/v1/households/:id (admin), DELETE /api/v1/households/:id (admin; implemented with recoverable soft-delete storage). Frontend: single zustand household.store, /households list with create flow, /households/:id detail with edit/delete, members placeholder table with invite/remove buttons (TODO for follow-up feat), and /more navigation to households plus sidebar More item. Does NOT include real member/invitation APIs.
evidence: Implemented worker household CRUD endpoints (POST/GET list/GET detail/PATCH/DELETE), non-deleted list/detail behavior, and admin-only update/delete checks with integration tests. Web now uses one household.store (zustand) and removed active-household store/context/switcher/header injection. Added /households list+create, /households/:id detail with edit/delete and members placeholder, and /more page household navigation. Verification passed: pnpm typecheck:worker, pnpm test:worker, pnpm typecheck:web, pnpm test:web, pnpm build:web, ./init.sh.
